## Change Type

- [ ] product
- [ ] governance
- [ ] mixed

## Delivery Contract

- [ ] This PR comes from an independent branch for a single change
- [ ] This change will merge through a PR into `main`
- [ ] Version bump follows SemVer for this merged change

## Product Changes

- None.

## Repo Governance Changes

- None.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Version/changelog updated when required
